tasks.label: Publish: spienx registry
args: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; if (-not (Test-Path '.env')) { throw '.env file not found in workspace root.' }; Get-Content '.env' | Where-Object { $_ -and -not $_.StartsWith('#') } | ForEach-Object { $parts = $_ -split '=', 2; if ($parts.Length -eq 2) { [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable($parts[0], $parts[1], 'Process') } }; hatch build; hatch publish -n
